programme.desc: The history of Las Vegas through profiles of entertainers, entrepreneurs, the Mob and politicians over seven decades. The first edition reveals how the arrival of the Mafia and its money catapulted the city from a raffish frontier town to a glamorous entertainment destination featuring the biggest stars of the nightclub era.

programme.title: Vegas: The Story of Sin City
programme.desc: A look at Las Vegas's golden age started by a Rat Pack show in 1960, an era defined by a heavy-drinking, woman-chasing, irreverent kind of hipness embodied by Frank Sinatra.

programme.desc: Documentary hearing from women groomed in their early teenage years by rock stars, as well as exploring the lengths the music industry went to in order to protect its own.

programme.title: Man on Wire

Featuring re-creations of his earlier stunts at Paris's Notre Dame cathedral and Sydney Harbour Bridge.

programme.title: I Am Joe Frazier
programme.desc: A profile of the former world heavyweight boxing champion, a perfectionist who triumphantly emerged from Muhammad Ali's long shadow.

programme.desc: Oliver Stone's documentary examining the assassination of US president John F Kennedy, using James DiEugenio's 1992 book Destiny Betrayed: JFK, Cuba and the Garrison Case, and recently declassified US government files to shine a light on what happened in Dallas on November 22, 1963. Narrated by Whoopi Goldberg and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Lost Tapes
